purpose: Additional category folder map for Health Manifested YouTube songs, meditations, videos, cartoons, playlists, and spiritual learning resources.

categories.title: Astrology Aspect Songs
categories.purpose: Playlist guides and metadata for Health Manifested songs that teach astrology aspects, aspect meanings, planetary relationships, and chart interpretation through music and spiritual learning.

categories.title: Astrology Retrograde Songs
categories.purpose: Playlist guides and metadata for songs that teach retrograde planets, reflection cycles, inner review, delays, revisions, and spiritual lessons connected to retrograde energy.

categories.title: Astrology House Songs
categories.purpose: Playlist guides and metadata for songs and videos that teach the twelve houses in astrology, life areas, chart interpretation, and house-based spiritual learning.

categories.title: Manifestation Songs
categories.purpose: Playlist guides and metadata for songs that support manifestation, abundance, affirmations, self-concept, money mindset, spiritual alignment, and intentional creation.

categories.title: Zodiac Season Songs
categories.purpose: Playlist guides and metadata for songs that teach zodiac seasons, seasonal astrology, solar cycles, and spiritual themes connected to each sign season.

categories.title: Moon Phase Songs
categories.purpose: Playlist guides and metadata for songs that teach moon phases, lunar cycles, emotional timing, intention setting, release, reflection, and spiritual rhythm.

categories.title: Astrology Eclipse Songs
categories.purpose: Playlist guides and metadata for songs that teach eclipse astrology, nodal shifts, karmic turning points, release, change, and spiritual redirection.

categories.title: Astrology Basics Lessons
categories.purpose: Playlist guides and metadata for beginner-friendly astrology lessons, songs, and videos that introduce signs, planets, houses, aspects, chart basics, and spiritual self-discovery.
